title: masdevallia marginella
intro: Masdevallia marginella, also known as the Margined Masdevallia, is a species of orchid native to the Andes mountains in South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Masdevallia marginella include its ability to aid in the healing process, reduce fever, and act as an antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
